organization.short_description:
Huntingdon Valley Bank (HVB) was a community-based, full-service financial institution founded in 1871 and headquartered in Huntingdon Valley, Pennsylvania. It served customers primarily in Bucks, Montgomery, and Philadelphia Counties through multiple branch offices. HVB focused on providing a complete line of business and consumer banking products, including deposit accounts, loans, online and mobile banking, and bill pay. The bank emphasized community-based lending and high-quality personal service.

HVB positioned itself as "The Better Experience Bank," highlighting innovation and superior customer service. It underwent a brand transformation in 2013, which helped it compete effectively against larger banks. HVB was recognized as one of the fastest-growing banks in the nation, doubling its assets over six years. In June 2023, HVB was acquired and fully converted into First Citizens Community Bank, transitioning its operations and branches into FCCB's network.

organization.short_description:
CrossCountry Mortgage, LLC (CCM) is a leading retail mortgage lender based in Cleveland, Ohio. Founded in 2003, the company has expanded significantly, operating over 700 branches across all 50 states, Washington D.C., and Puerto Rico, with a workforce of more than 7,000 employees. CCM is recognized as America's #1 retail mortgage lender and is approved as a seller and servicer by Freddie Mac, Fannie Mae, and Ginnie Mae.

CCM offers a wide range of mortgage solutions, including home purchase mortgages, refinancing options, and home equity products. Their innovative offerings include CCM CashPlus, CCM EasyGreen, and CCM Lock2Sell, designed to enhance borrower choices. In 2024, the company achieved significant milestones, financing over 83,000 home purchases and funding nearly $10 billion in purchase volume in just one quarter. CCM is also committed to community support, providing over $15 million in down payment assistance to first-time homebuyers and engaging in numerous charitable initiatives.

organization.short_description:
CMG Financial is a privately-held mortgage banking firm founded in 1993 and based in San Ramon, California. The company operates as a leading mortgage lender across all 50 states and the District of Columbia, holding federal agency lending approvals with various agencies including HUD, VA, and FNMA.

CMG Financial offers a range of mortgage lending products and services through three main origination channels: retail lending via CMG Home Loans, wholesale lending, and correspondent lending. The company has over 240 retail branches and more than 700 loan officers nationwide. One of its notable innovations is HomeFundIt™, a down payment gifting platform that has assisted over 2,500 families in purchasing homes.

Recognized for its growth and performance, CMG Home Loans ranked as the #6 retail lender in the nation in 2024. The company is known for its responsible lending practices and has received accolades as a top mortgage employer and lender. Additionally, CMG Financial supports community initiatives through the CMG Foundation, established in 2012.
